Notice-Motion To Be Relieved As Counsel
Off Calendar Jun-10-2015 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance and the tentative ruling is adopted: Brayton Purcell LLP's motion to be relieved as counsel for plaintiff Melvin McMinn is off calendar at the request of Brayton Purcell. Judge: Teri L. Jackson, Not Reported. (503/TLJ)

Notice-Motion To Be Relieved As Counsel
Off Calendar May-27-2015 Continued To Jun-10-15 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 503
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Patrick R. Campbell of BRAYTON PURCELL LLP (415-898-1555), appearing for moving party Brayton Purcell LLC
Simran Mahal of WFBM, LLP (415-781-7072), appearing for defendant Thomas Dee Engineering Company

RULING:
BRAYTON PURCELL LLP'S MOTION TO BE RELIEVED AS COUNSEL FOR PLAINTIFF MELVIN MCMINN

Pursuant to Counsel for Brayton Purcell LLP's representation the Court made the following ruling: Brayton Purcell LLP's motion to be relieved as counsel for plaintiff Melvin McMinn is continued to June 10, 2015 at 9:30 a.m. in Department 503. The Court requests Plaintiff to be present at the hearing. Counsel for Brayton Purcell is to notify all parties of the continuance. Tentative ruling remains. Judge: Teri L. Jackson, Reporter: Kyle McLean of AIKEN WELCH, CSR #13787 (Tel: 510-451-1580) (503/TLJ)
